'''ây-y-sh''' ('''yayasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vblog|vblog]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vblog|vblog]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-y-sh
|-
! Lemma
| yayasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yayashithi|yayashithi]] || [[word:yayashiji|yayashiji]] || [[word:yayashishi|yayashishi]] || [[word:yayashi|yayashi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yayashuthuth|yayashuthuth]] || [[word:yayashujuj|yayashujuj]] || [[word:yayashushush|yayashushush]] || [[word:yayash|yayash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yayashuthu|yayashuthu]] || [[word:yayashuju|yayashuju]] || [[word:yayashushu|yayashushu]] || [[word:yayashu|yayashu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yayashufuth|yayashufuth]] || [[word:yayashufuj|yayashufuj]] || [[word:yayashufush|yayashufush]] || [[word:yayashuf|yayashuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yayashethe|yayashethe]] || [[word:yayasheje|yayasheje]] || [[word:yayasheshe|yayasheshe]] || [[word:yayashe|yayashe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yayashothoth|yayashothoth]] || [[word:yayashojoj|yayashojoj]] || [[word:yayashoshosh|yayashoshosh]] || [[word:yayash|yayash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yayashotho|yayashotho]] || [[word:yayashojo|yayashojo]] || [[word:yayashosho|yayashosho]] || [[word:yayasho|yayasho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yayashofoth|yayashofoth]] || [[word:yayashofoj|yayashofoj]] || [[word:yayashofosh|yayashofosh]] || [[word:yayashof|yayashof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yayashĂŠthĂŠ|yayashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yayashĂŠjĂŠ|yayashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yayashĂŠshĂŠ|yayashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yayashĂŠ|yayashĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yayashathath|yayashathath]] || [[word:yayashajaj|yayashajaj]] || [[word:yayashashash|yayashashash]] || [[word:yayash|yayash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yayashatha|yayashatha]] || [[word:yayashaja|yayashaja]] || [[word:yayashasha|yayashasha]] || [[word:yayasha|yayasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yayashafath|yayashafath]] || [[word:yayashafaj|yayashafaj]] || [[word:yayashafash|yayashafash]] || [[word:yayashaf|yayashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yayashasha|yayashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyayashasha|goyayashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyayashasha|gokiyayashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yayashnĂŒsha|yayashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyayashnknĂŒsha|goyayashnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyayashnĂŒsha|gokiyayashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yayashĂ«sha|yayashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyayashnkshĂ«sha|goyayashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyayashĂ«sha|gokiyayashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yayashrosha|yayashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyayashnkrosha|goyayashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyayashrosha|gokiyayashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yayashmusha|yayashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyayashnkmusha|goyayashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyayashmusha|gokiyayashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yayasherasha|yayasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyayashnksherasha|goyayashnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyayasherasha|gokiyayasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yayashngasha|yayashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyayashnkngasha|goyayashnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyayashngasha|gokiyayashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yayashyasha|yayashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyayashnkyasha|goyayashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyayashyasha|gokiyayashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yayashyamasha|yayashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyayashnkyamasha|goyayashnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyayashyamasha|gokiyayashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yayashnĂŒshĂ«sha|yayashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyayashnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goyayashnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyayashnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiyayashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yayashnĂŒrosha|yayashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyayashnknĂŒrosha|goyayashnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyayashnĂŒrosha|gokiyayashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yayashnĂŒmusha|yayashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyayashnknĂŒmusha|goyayashnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyayashnĂŒmusha|gokiyayashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yayashĂ«nĂŒsha|yayashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyayashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goyayashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyayashĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiyayashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yayashĂ«rosha|yayashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyayashnkshĂ«rosha|goyayashnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyayashĂ«rosha|gokiyayashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yayashĂ«musha|yayashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyayashnkshĂ«musha|goyayashnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyayashĂ«musha|gokiyayashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yayashronĂŒsha|yayashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyayashnkronĂŒsha|goyayashnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyayashronĂŒsha|gokiyayashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yayashroshĂ«sha|yayashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyayashnkroshĂ«sha|goyayashnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyayashroshĂ«sha|gokiyayashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yayashromusha|yayashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyayashnkromusha|goyayashnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyayashromusha|gokiyayashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yayashmunĂŒsha|yayashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyayashnkmunĂŒsha|goyayashnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyayashmunĂŒsha|gokiyayashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yayashmushĂ«sha|yayashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyayashnkmushĂ«sha|goyayashnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyayashmushĂ«sha|gokiyayashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yayashmurosha|yayashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyayashnkmurosha|goyayashnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyayashmurosha|gokiyayashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yayash|yayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:yĂŠyĂŠsh|yĂŠyĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyayash|hoyayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoyĂŠyĂŠsh|hoyĂŠyĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyayash|hohoyayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyĂŠyĂŠsh|hohoyĂŠyĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒyayash|nĂŒyayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒyĂŠyĂŠsh|nĂŒyĂŠyĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyayash|nĂŒnĂŒyayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠyĂŠsh|nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠyĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻyayash|nĂŻyayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻyĂŠyĂŠsh|nĂŻyĂŠyĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyayash|nĂŻnĂŻyayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠyĂŠsh|nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠyĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyayash|luyayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luyĂŠyĂŠsh|luyĂŠyĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyayash|luluyayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyĂŠyĂŠsh|luluyĂŠyĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyayash|liyayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liyĂŠyĂŠsh|liyĂŠyĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyayash|liliyayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyĂŠyĂŠsh|liliyĂŠyĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyayash|koyayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koyĂŠyĂŠsh|koyĂŠyĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyayash|kokoyayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyĂŠyĂŠsh|kokoyĂŠyĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyayash|keyayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keyĂŠyĂŠsh|keyĂŠyĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyayash|kekeyayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyĂŠyĂŠsh|kekeyĂŠyĂŠsh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
